decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHXSC/ai_RNbBHXSF insight-item groups use bgcolor var(--color_aiRNbAaxgt_default) with border_roundness 8; DashboardInsightsCard applies Tailwind bg-accent/30 rounded-lg instead. DS-01 already exposes --color_aiRNbAaxgt_default in tokens.css and bubble-styles.css. Named ui_refs render with correct hierarchy, copy, and data-bubble-id markers; criteria_audit AC-1/AC-3 pass. ui_evidence is partial only for bgcolor delta — not a missing region. One-line token swap is optional DASH-05 polish; no downstream item depends_on DASH-05 for exact row tint.

Valid post-migration gap: when pathenrollment1 table exists but returns no active row, fetchCurrentPathEnrollment returns EMPTY_ENROLLMENT from the table branch (pathEnrollmentApi.ts) without consulting onboarding_data fallback. Brownfield prototype lacks pathenrollment1 migration (coverage preflight gap); current path mirrors DASH-03 microCommitmentsApi interim pattern and FV-1 passes via onboarding_data when table is absent. Merging table miss with deriveFromOnboardingData belongs in PATHS-03-path-detail-enrollment-popup / PATHS-06-enrollment-floating-services-bar migration wave — untestable today. DASH-06 and DASH-07 depends_on gates for card mount and routing are already satisfiable.

routes.ts maps DASHBOARD_CURRENT_PATH_SLOT_BUBBLE_ID to ai_RNbBHXSf, so DashboardMain DashboardSlot and DashboardCurrentPathCard both emit the same data-bubble-id — duplicate selectors for parity tooling only. AC-2 requires the card-root marker on ai_RNbBHXSf; criteria_audit and ui_evidence for all other named path-card ui_refs pass. Optional fix: transparent slot wrapper without data-bubble-id (left-column ai_RNbBHXRX pattern). No downstream depends_on impact.

IR confirms ai_RNbBHXSq (Next: prefix under ai_RNbBHXSo) and ai_RNbBHXSt (arrow + title group sibling under ai_RNbBHXSl) are distinct Bubble regions both bound to pathenrollment1 current_session title — intentional duplicate surfacing per IR hierarchy, not a missing region. Implementation mirrors both with enrollment.nextStepTitle; ui_evidence for ai_RNbBHXSq, ai_RNbBHXSt, ai_RNbBHXSu, and ai_RNbBHXSv pass. AC-2 scopes path-next-step ai_RNbBHXSt fed by enrollment binding — satisfied. Suppressing ai_RNbBHXSt would diverge from Bubble.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass, prior bTIrY wrapper rewrite resolved. Deferred: C-1 insight-row bgcolor token polish (optional DASH-05 cleanup); C-2 pathenrollment1 table-miss onboarding fallback merge to PATHS-03/PATHS-06 migration wave; C-3 duplicate ai_RNbBHXSf slot wrapper (optional parity-tooling cleanup). Accepted: C-4 duplicate next-step regions intentional Bubble IR parity.
